Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}All right... I don't think anyone will come up here for a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I leveraged my position on the student council to make it happen.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}This is, um, the first time I've ever used my authority for personal reasons...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Wait, that's not important right now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}What I'm trying to say is, we need to talk.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Firstly, I have to apologize...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I'm sorry for what happened last time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}You know... The other day, in front of the station...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 13 4 5 5}Oh, I see. You're pretending it was nothing to spare me the embarrassment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}The things my ex-fiancé said to you were inexcusable, but more importantly...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}I wanted to apologize for my own behavior.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}I said all manner of things about you. And then I just... ran off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}That was unbelievably insensitive of me. I'm sorry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I had been planning on telling you my feelings...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I just didn't think I'd end up shouting them in public like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Hey, don't tease me like that! I didn't think I had it in me either...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Ever since I started spending time with you, my life has been full of new experiences.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}I've felt shock, joy, even outrage... But every time, I've always been thinking of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Ever since I started spending time with you, my life has been full of new experiences.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}I've felt shock, joy, even outrage... But every time, I've always been thinking of you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Now that it's come to this, I'm obligated to tell you exactly how I feel.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Mitsuru's voice is trembling. I'd better[n]choose my words carefully...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Come to think of it, {f 0 1 2}I have a special{f 0 1 27}[n]{f 0 1 2}relationship with another person already{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}...I feel like I'm going to die of embarrassment.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}I... I'm so happy to hear that. Or should I say... I'm thankful?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Ngh, my heart... At this rate, it's going to end up like last time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}It really is wonderful, though... To know that the feeling is mutual.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Heh, I'm glad I managed to open my heart. As of today, you're more than just a friend to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}That said, given my situation, I can't go public about this just yet.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense Mitsuru's deep affection for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Things seem to be getting serious...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no going back now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}I've been thinking about this for a while now, but the way you address me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Er— That's exactly what I mean![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}You're on a first-name basis with me, while I've been sticking to formalities... It's a bit unbalanced.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 4 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}Er— Don't act like you don't know![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}You're on a first-name basis with me, while I've been sticking to formalities... It's a bit unbalanced.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}From now on, when it's just the two of us, I'll call you by your first name.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}It's going to be a bit awkward for me, but trust that this is what I want.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}In any case, today marks a change. I'm not going to let myself be constrained by my family heritage.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}It's because of who I am as an individual that I ended up meeting you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}Er— Look at all these things you're making me say. You'd better take responsibility for this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We spent some more time together,[n]and then returned to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}That's unfortunate, but I'm glad I cleared the air.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}You told me it was up to me how to handle these emotions. Thanks to that, I was able to be honest with myself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}If I had kept my feelings locked up, I never would have been able to move forward...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}It is imperative to be true to our hearts... Just as you were with your answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 62 0 0}If I hadn't harbored these emotions, I would have continued lying to myself, justifying it all under the Kirijo name.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}And if that had happened... there's no doubt I would have failed on my path in the future.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}From now on, I'm not going to let myself be constrained by my family heritage.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}It's because of who I am as an individual that I ended up meeting you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense Mitsuru's deep trust.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship has grown...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 66 0 0}Now then... I certainly have a lot to thank you for, but there's one more matter I'd like to bring up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 67 0 0}I haven't eaten since this morning, so I'm terribly famished. I'd say you bear some responsibility for this.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 68 0 0}I could do with some takoyaki on our way back. Your treat?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}I'd hardly complain if you were to do at least that much to mend a broken heart...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We stopped by the strip mall[n]and then returned to the dorm...[n]{f 1 1}
